messages:
## 当前仓库顶层目录和文件（简单分组）

### 目录
- `.cargo/` - Cargo 配置
- `.git/` - Git 仓库
- `.pids/` - 进程ID目录
- `.vscode/` - VSCode 配置
- `UI/` - 前端界面
- `configs/` - 配置文件
- `crates/` - Rust  crates
- `data/` - 数据目录
- `docker/` - Docker 相关
- `docs/` - 文档
- `document/` - 文档
- `external_skills/` - 外部技能
- `image/` - 图片资源
- `logs/` - 日志
- `migrations/` - 数据库迁移
- `node_modules/` - Node 依赖
- `patches/` - 补丁
- `pi_app/` - Pi 应用
- `plan/` - 计划
- `plans/` - 计划
- `prompts/` - 提示词
- `run/` - 运行时目录
- `scripts/` - 脚本
- `services/` - 服务
- `skill_develop/` - 技能开发
- `skills_output/` - 技能输出
- `systemd/` - Systemd 配置
- `tmp/` - 临时目录

### 可执行脚本
- `build-all.sh`
- `build-ui-nginx.sh`
- `check-logs.sh`
- `cross-build-upload-cloud.sh`
- `cross-build-upload.sh`
- `git-add-exclude.sh`
- `install-rustclaw-cmd.sh`
- `local-cross-build-upload-pi.sh`
- `pack-to-parent.sh`
- `package-release.sh`
- `push-sanitized-configs.sh`
- `setup-config.sh`
- `simulate-telegramd.sh`
- `start-all-bin.sh`
- `start-all.sh`
- `start-clawd-ui.sh`
- `start-clawd.sh`
- `start-feishud.sh`
- `start-future-adapters.sh`
- `start-larkd.sh`
- `start-telegramd.sh`
- `start-wa-web-bridge.sh`
- `start-wechatd.sh`
- `start-whatsapp-webd.sh`
- `start-whatsappd.sh`
- `stop-rustclaw.sh`
- `system_report.sh`
- `uninstall-rustclaw-cmd.sh`

### 配置文件
- `.dockerignore`
- `.env.example`
- `docker-compose.yml`
- `package.json`
- `package-lock.json`
- `rustclaw.service`

### 代码/项目文件
- `Cargo.toml`
- `Cargo.lock`
- `rustclaw`

### 文档文件
- `AGENTS.md`
- `README.md` / `README.zh-CN.md` / `README_cn.md`
- `RUSTCLAW_SERVICE_README.md`
- `USAGE.md`
- `LICENSE` / `LICENSE.zh-CN.md`
- `failed-routing-cases.md`
- `memory-usage-plan.md`
- `path_note.txt`
- `pwd_report.txt`

### 图片资源
- `RustClaw.png`
- `RustClaw480X320.png`
- `longxia.png`

### 其他
- `test_contract.sqlite` - 测试数据库
